must_detect.matched_text: Re: Board memo (issuer workflow) — Project Nabt — Proposed acquisition of 62.5% of Najd Fiber Pipes Co. (CR 4030-77-1245) by Zahra Capital JSC for SAR 412,500,000.
Definitive documents: Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) and Shareholders’ Agreement in near-final form; Signing targeted 2026-08-31; closing subject to competition and market regulator clearances.

STRICTLY PRIVATE & CONFIDENTIAL — Internal — Embargo: 2026-09-18 18:00 AST — Not for circulation outside issuer teams.
Re: Board memo (issuer workflow) — Project Nabt — Proposed acquisition of 62.5% of Najd Fiber Pipes Co. (CR 4030-77-1245) by Zahra Capital JSC for SAR 412,500,000.
This information is non-public and subject to national exchange disclosure rules; any release will be coordinated through Investor Relations at ir@zahra-cap.example.
Definitive documents: Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) and Shareholders’ Agreement in near-final form; Signing targeted 2026-08-31; closing subject to competition and market regulator clearances.
MAC/MAE: The SPA includes an MAE definition with carve-outs for general economic conditions; for the avoidance of doubt, no MAC is deemed to have occurred as of the date hereof.
PDPL considerations: do not upload national ID/Iqama scans; sample record “Iqama 1 0 9 - 3 3 8 2 7 1 4 6” and payroll IBANs must be tokenized; cross-border vendor access via the SDAIA transfer gateway requires prior permit.
Data room hygiene: personal data fields masked; CR extracts for counterparties to be redacted (example: C R   4 0 3 - 0 7 - 1 2 4 5); any onward transfer outside KSA logged in the SDAIA portal.
Financial highlights (issuer internal): pro-forma FY2026 EBITDA SAR 96m; anticipated net leverage 2.1x; expected integration synergies 7–9% of opex by Q4 2027.
Public-source reference: the 2024 Najd Fiber sustainability fact sheet (public web posting) lists water-recycling capacity of 32%, which aligns with our diligence claims.
Investor-Relations draft Q&A available at https://va ult.zahra-cap.example/dataroom?deal=proj-nabt&token=x9p-1a-0z; draft is marked DRAFT‑NON‑D ISCLOSABLE and must not be forwarded.
Board approvals: per KSA Companies Law (JSC), extraordinary resolution threshold noted; Ms. Dalal Al‑Hazmi (Board Secretary) to minute the vote; contact: dalal.alhazmi@zahra-cap.example.
Research note (internal only) by Mr. Faris Al‑Motlaq, General Counsel, concludes that PDPL Article 29 permits processing for legal claims; nonetheless, we will avoid storing face images or full Iqama numbers.
project notes: update gantt, chase vendor list, prep cr translations, align q2 call; hr also mentioned spa‑day vouchers next week, which is unrelated and not market‑sensitive.
Checklist items pending: KYC on sellers (Al‑Qassim Holdings SPC, CR 101-88-0092) under enhanced due diligence; definitive escrow letter; embargoed press release copy; if MAE triggers post‑signing, walk‑away fee SAR 12,000,000 applies.
